channel.title: Details about this frontity-share npm package

item.title: Details about this frontity-share npm package
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Hey @alex.fernando.801
I am not affiliated with this package in any ways but when I check the code (https://github.com/mymakarim/frontity-share/blob/master/packages/frontity-share/src/sharingButtons.js) I can see it just takes the post based on the current url. So it will work with custom post types and pages as well. You just have to place it in the correct place.

Good luck.

Read full topic
item.source: Details about this frontity-share npm package

item.title: Details about this frontity-share npm package
item.dc:creator: alex.fernando.801
item.description:
@mymakarim
@ mymakarim, thanks for doing this package, it seems really helpful, is this work inside whatever react component in frontity or it has to be specifically called inside a post.js file and for general posts, and maybe not for a custom post type blog post?

Thank in advance, great work!

npm

frontity-share

Sharing Buttons Package for Frontity.. Latest version: 0.1.5, last published: 3 years ago. Start using frontity-share in your project by running `npm i frontity-share`. There are no other projects in the npm registry using frontity-share.

Read full topic
item.source: Details about this frontity-share npm package
